---
title: "Walter Henry Praed Coleridge"
---

## Walter Henry Praed Coleridge

**Dates:** (1886-1967)

### Description

youngest son of Ernest Coleridge

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from April 10th  [?16th 1887]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
